description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push and pull request events to dev, release, and prerelease branches, excluding paths under docs/ and mkdocs.yml. Use a matrix strategy to run a build-test job on ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest, targeting different .NET solutions. For each job, check out the repository, set up .NET 9.0.*, clean and restore dependencies, build, and test the solution.
